# starphone-web-svelte service discovery
Primary domain: https://starphone-web-svelte.platphormnews.com

Useful endpoints:
- https://starphone-web-svelte.platphormnews.com/
- https://starphone-web-svelte.platphormnews.com/support
- https://starphone-web-svelte.platphormnews.com/status
- https://starphone-web-svelte.platphormnews.com/faq
- https://starphone-web-svelte.platphormnews.com/api/health
- https://starphone-web-svelte.platphormnews.com/api/v1/health
- https://starphone-web-svelte.platphormnews.com/api/docs
- https://starphone-web-svelte.platphormnews.com/openapi.json
- https://starphone-web-svelte.platphormnews.com/.well-known/mcp.json
- https://starphone-web-svelte.platphormnews.com/.well-known/agents.json
- https://starphone-web-svelte.platphormnews.com/.well-known/agent-policy.json
